template.description: Whenever activity Visualize Grid-complete is executed, activity Visualize Stats-start has to be eventually executed afterwards.
template.name: response

statemessages.message:
There are two options when this constraint is satisfied:

  • Either task "A" has not been executed yet, or
  • Task "A" has been executed, and task "B" has been executed at least once after task "A".
This constraint is (permanently) violated when the instance is closed such that task "A" was executed, but task "B" was not executed after task "A".

This constraint is temporarily violated because task "A" has been executed, and task "B" was not executed after task "A".

Execute task "B" at least once to satisfy this constraint.

template.description: Visualize Stats-start has to be preceded by Visualize Grid-complete. Visualize Stats-start can happen only after Visualize Grid-complete had happened.
template.name: precedence

statemessages.message:
This constraint is satisfied because either:
  • task "B" was never executed, or
  • first task "A" was executed, and then task "B" was executed.
<html>This constraint is violated because task "B" was executed before task "A".</html>
<html>This should never happen!</html>

template.description: Whenever activity Display Movement Message-start is executed, activity Display Movement Message-unknown has to be eventually executed afterwards.
template.name: response

statemessages.message:
There are two options when this constraint is satisfied:

  • Either task "A" has not been executed yet, or
  • Task "A" has been executed, and task "B" has been executed at least once after task "A".
This constraint is (permanently) violated when the instance is closed such that task "A" was executed, but task "B" was not executed after task "A".

This constraint is temporarily violated because task "A" has been executed, and task "B" was not executed after task "A".

Execute task "B" at least once to satisfy this constraint.

template.description: Display Movement Message-unknown has to be preceded by Display Movement Message-start. Display Movement Message-unknown can happen only after Display Movement Message-start had happened.
template.name: precedence

statemessages.message:
This constraint is satisfied because either:
  • task "B" was never executed, or
  • first task "A" was executed, and then task "B" was executed.
<html>This constraint is violated because task "B" was executed before task "A".</html>
<html>This should never happen!</html>

  • first task "A" was executed, and then task "B" was executed.
<html>This constraint is violated because task "B" was executed before task "A".</html>
<html>This should never happen!</html>

This constraint is temporarily violated because task "A" has been executed, and task "B" was not executed after task "A".

Execute task "B" at least once to satisfy this constraint.

template.description: Clear Movement Message-unknown has to be preceded by Clear Movement Message-start. Clear Movement Message-unknown can happen only after Clear Movement Message-start had happened.
template.name: precedence

statemessages.message:
This constraint is satisfied because either:
  • task "B" was never executed, or
  • first task "A" was executed, and then task "B" was executed.
<html>This constraint is violated because task "B" was executed before task "A".</html>
<html>This should never happen!</html>

template.description: Whenever activity Update Player Position and Conditions-complete is executed, activity Manipulate Grid?-start has to be eventually executed afterwards.
template.name: response

statemessages.message:
There are two options when this constraint is satisfied:

  • Either task "A" has not been executed yet, or
  • Task "A" has been executed, and task "B" has been executed at least once after task "A".
This constraint is (permanently) violated when the instance is closed such that task "A" was executed, but task "B" was not executed after task "A".

This constraint is temporarily violated because task "A" has been executed, and task "B" was not executed after task "A".

Execute task "B" at least once to satisfy this constraint.

template.description: Manipulate Grid?-start has to be preceded by Update Player Position and Conditions-complete. Manipulate Grid?-start can happen only after Update Player Position and Conditions-complete had happened.
template.name: precedence

statemessages.message:
This constraint is satisfied because either:
  • task "B" was never executed, or
  • first task "A" was executed, and then task "B" was executed.
<html>This constraint is violated because task "B" was executed before task "A".</html>
<html>This should never happen!</html>

template.description: Whenever activity Visualize Stats-unknown is executed, activity Visualize Stats-complete has to be eventually executed afterwards.
template.name: response

statemessages.message:
There are two options when this constraint is satisfied:

  • Either task "A" has not been executed yet, or
  • Task "A" has been executed, and task "B" has been executed at least once after task "A".
This constraint is (permanently) violated when the instance is closed such that task "A" was executed, but task "B" was not executed after task "A".

This constraint is temporarily violated because task "A" has been executed, and task "B" was not executed after task "A".

Execute task "B" at least once to satisfy this constraint.

template.description: Visualize Stats-complete has to be preceded by Visualize Stats-unknown. Visualize Stats-complete can happen only after Visualize Stats-unknown had happened.
template.name: precedence

statemessages.message:
This constraint is satisfied because either:
  • task "B" was never executed, or
  • first task "A" was executed, and then task "B" was executed.
<html>This constraint is violated because task "B" was executed before task "A".</html>
<html>This should never happen!</html>
